# Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / content
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes (run `pnpm format` to fix)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm check:links` passes
- [ ] Docs/examples updated if behavior changed

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: tradeoffs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
